question: 总共有多少乘客？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger) RETURN count(p) AS total_passengers

question: 乘客的平均年龄是多少？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.age IS NOT NULL RETURN avg(p.age) AS avg_age

question: 存活了多少乘客？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.survived = 1 RETURN count(p) AS survived_count

question: 存活率是多少？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger) WITH count(p) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN p.survived = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS survived RETURN round(100.0 * survived / total, 2) AS survival_rate

question: 各舱位等级的平均票价是多少？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:BELONGS_TO_CLASS]->(c:Pclass) RETURN c.className AS class, round(avg(p.fare), 2) AS avg_fare ORDER BY avg_fare DESC

question: 男女乘客各有多少人？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger) RETURN p.sex AS gender, count(p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC

question: 女性乘客的存活率是多少？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger {sex: 'female'}) WITH count(p) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN p.survived = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS survived RETURN round(100.0 * survived / total, 2) AS female_survival_rate

question: 男性乘客的存活率是多少？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger {sex: 'male'}) WITH count(p) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN p.survived = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS survived RETURN round(100.0 * survived / total, 2) AS male_survival_rate

question: 票价最高的乘客是谁？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger) RETURN p.name AS name, p.fare AS fare ORDER BY fare DESC LIMIT 1

question: 票价最低的乘客是谁？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.fare > 0 RETURN p.name AS name, p.fare AS fare ORDER BY fare ASC LIMIT 1

question: 各舱位等级的存活率分别是多少？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:BELONGS_TO_CLASS]->(c:Pclass) WITH c.className AS class, count(p) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN p.survived = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS survived RETURN class, round(100.0 * survived / total, 2) AS survival_rate ORDER BY survival_rate DESC

question: 年龄最大的乘客是谁？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.age IS NOT NULL RETURN p.name AS name, p.age AS age ORDER BY age DESC LIMIT 1

question: 各登船港口的乘客数量是多少？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:EMBARKED_AT]->(e:Embarked) RETURN e.portName AS port, count(p) AS count ORDER BY count DESC

question: 头等舱的乘客平均年龄是多少？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:BELONGS_TO_CLASS]->(c:Pclass {className: 'First'}) WHERE p.age IS NOT NULL RETURN round(avg(p.age), 2) AS avg_age

question: 三等舱中票价最贵的乘客是谁？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:BELONGS_TO_CLASS]->(c:Pclass {className: 'Third'}) RETURN p.name AS name, p.fare AS fare ORDER BY fare DESC LIMIT 1

question: 每个港口的男女比例是多少？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:EMBARKED_AT]->(e:Embarked) RETURN e.portName AS port, p.sex AS gender, count(p) AS count ORDER BY port, gender

question: 年龄在18岁以下的乘客有多少人存活？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.age < 18 AND p.survived = 1 RETURN count(p) AS young_survived

question: 票价的方差是多少？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.fare IS NOT NULL WITH avg(p.fare) AS mean MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.fare IS NOT NULL RETURN round(avg((p.fare - mean) ^ 2), 2) AS fare_variance

question: 存活乘客的平均票价是多少？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.survived = 1 RETURN round(avg(p.fare), 2) AS avg_fare_survived

question: 死亡乘客的平均票价是多少？
cypher: MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.survived = 0 RETURN round(avg(p.fare), 2) AS avg_fare_died
